item.title: Head of Russia’s Antidoping Agency Was Involved in 2014 Doping Scheme, Whistle-Blower Claims
item.description: The accusation surfaced as Russia tries to re-establish its Olympics eligibility.

item.title: Former Prince Andrew’s Arrest Upends Royal Family’s Effort to Move Past His Scandal
item.description: King Charles III’s family, long rocked by infighting and grievous losses, is facing what could be the gravest threat to its moral authority in more th...

item.title: Why the United States Is Seeing an Ongoing Tourism Slump
item.description: Last year, the U.S. was the only major destination to see a decline in international travelers. With increased scrutiny at the border, ICE violence an...

item.title: Eric Dane, McSteamy on ‘Grey’s Anatomy,’ Dies at 53 After Battling ALS
item.description: His breakout role came in 2006 as the handsome Dr. Mark Sloan, nicknamed McSteamy, the head of plastic surgery at a Seattle hospital. He died 10 month...

item.title: U.S. Economy Grew Modestly at End of 2025
item.description: Gross domestic product expanded at a 1.4 percent annual rate in the last quarter of the year, hit by the effects of the government shutdown.
